title: Caramelized Kenyan Dates Stir-fry
description: A dense and fermented date-night dish featuring high-protein-friendly ingredients such as caramelized dates, onion salt, and a touch of spices to elevate the flavor profile.
instructions: Wash the dates and place them in a small saucepan.
Add enough water to cover the dates. Let it simmer for about 10 minutes or until soft.
Drain the excess water from the dates and chop them into small pieces.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium-high heat. Add chopped garlic and coriander seeds. Sauté until fragrant (about 30 seconds).
Add onion salt and cardamom powder to the pan and stir for another minute.
Stir in the caramelized dates into the pan and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring occasionally until well combined and slightly thickened.
Transfer to a serving dish. Serve warm as a snack or appetizer.
